text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! We're running out of time!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, the fact that the Umamusume you've taken
under your wing hasn't won a single race is
becoming an issue...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If she doesn't get her first win by September, her
contract may be canceled!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And September isn't far away! Please, you must
find some way to lead her to victory!
